name: Knowles Corp
summary: PART I Unless the context otherwise requires, references in this Annual Report on Form 10-K to Knowles, the Company, we, our, or us refer to Knowles Corporation and its consolidated subsidiaries. Our Company We are a leading manufacturer of specialty electronic components. We design parts that perform unique, critical functions for innovative technologies.
